英國英格蘭斯塔福爾李
zh.Abbotsbury, Dorset, England: 英國多瑟特阿波次波利

zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey Stafford於1347年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，他的父親John Stafford27歲，母親Elizabeth Somerville36歲。他於1365年與Alice Greville在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1413年10月31日在英國英格蘭享年66歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特阿波次波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey Stafford于1347年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，他的父亲John Stafford27岁，母亲Elizabeth Somerville36岁。他于1365年与Alice Greville在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1413年10月31日在英国英格兰享年66岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特阿波次波利。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey Stafford was born in 1347, in Staffordshire, England, his father, John Stafford, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Somerville, was 36. He married Alice Greville in 1365, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 31 October 1413, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey Stafford est né en 1347, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Stafford, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Somerville, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Alice Greville en 1365, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 31 octobre 1413, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Abbotsbury, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey Stafford 1347 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Stafford 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Somerville 36. Er hat 1365 in England Alice Greville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 31. Oktober 1413 im Alter von 66 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Stafford è nato il nel 1347 nel Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, John Stafford, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Somerville, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Alice Greville nel 1365, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 31 ottobre 1413, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Abbotsbury, Dorset, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey Stafford(이)가 1347년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Stafford(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Somerville(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1365년 영국에서 Alice Greville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1413년 10월 31일 영국 잉글랜드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 애벗스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Stafford nasceu em 1347, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Stafford, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Somerville, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Greville em 1365, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 31 de outubro de 1413, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey Stafford родился в 1347 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Stafford было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Somerville, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Greville в 1365 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 31 октября 1413 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности эббоцбури, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey Stafford nació en 1347, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Stafford, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Somerville, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Alice Greville en 1365, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 31 de octubre de 1413, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inglaterra.
